title: Video by fit_4_football
description:
⚽️UNFAIR⚽️

Speaking to the players @naasfootballclub about learning to deal with it when it’s unfair! Football is often not fair and the same can be said about life! So why moan about it just get comfortable with it being unfair so you are ready! ⚽️

Control how you are reacting to the situation rather than trying to control the whole situation ⚽️

#footballfitness #socceracademy #footballdrills #footballacademy
